channel.title: Personal Growth on Knowledge Base
channel.description: Recent content in Personal Growth on Knowledge Base

item.title: Latticework of Mental Models for Life
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: A living collection of principles that cut across business, creativity, and everyday life.

item.title: Transform Your Life: The Power of Personal Development
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: Unlock your potential and transform your life through personal development. Discover actionable steps to attract success and happiness today!
